ingredients_text: Milk chocolate 50% (polydextrose; maltitol, erythritol; cocoa butter; chocolate liquor; whole milk powder; skimmed milk powder; milk fat; soya lecithins; pgpr; carrageenan; natural and artificial flavors; steviol glycosides); filling 50% (maltitol syrup; vegetable fat (palm oil, palm kernel oil, sunflower lecithins); skimmed milk powder; sorbitol; coconut flakes 3,6%; soya lecithins, pgpr; artificial flavor).
product_name: Milk chocolate pralines with smooth coconut filling diamonds
